nls.ext.description: Paste-only + on-disk encrypted editor for .env files. Activated via 'Reopen Editor With…' when a sibling .env.keys is present. Values are auto-encrypted on save and decrypted in the view so it looks like the normal variant — keys remain plaintext.
nls.config.title: Vibecode .env Encryption
nls.config.strategy.description: Encryption backend used when writing values. `none` stores plaintext (same as the normal variant). `dotenvx` encrypts values with DOTENV_PUBLIC_KEY and requires a sibling .env.keys file — bootstrap once with `npx dotenvx encrypt`.
nls.config.strategy.none.description: No encryption — values stored as plaintext.
nls.config.strategy.dotenvx.description: secp256k1 ECIES encryption, dotenvx-compatible. Requires DOTENV_PUBLIC_KEY in .env and a sibling .env.keys file.
nls.config.strategy.infisical.description: (Stub — not implemented) Remote secret store. Values will be replaced by reference tokens. Falls back to `none` until the SDK is wired up.
nls.command.enableEncryption.title: Vibecode - Enable Encryption (Generate .env.keys)
nls.command.refreshHub.title: Vibecode - Refresh Encryption Hub
nls.command.selectStrategy.title: Vibecode - Select Encryption Strategy
nls.command.openEncrypted.title: Vibecode - Open in Encrypted Editor
nls.view.container.title: Vibecode .env Encryption

runtime.Click an input and paste (⌘V). Typing is: Click an input and paste (⌘V). Typing is disabled for values. Pasted values are not displayed.
No keys yet. Add one below.
runtime.Invalid key name. Use letters, digits, u: Invalid key name. Use letters, digits, underscore; start with a letter or underscore.
runtime.This removes the key and its value from: This removes the key and its value from .env. This cannot be undone (other than via undo on the underlying text editor).
runtime.Missing in this file (declared in schema: Missing in this file (declared in schema):
runtime.Extra in this file (not in schema):: Extra in this file (not in schema):
runtime.Changes are written immediately. Save wi: Changes are written immediately. Save with ⌘S / Ctrl+S if you want to persist explicitly (auto-save respects your VSCode settings).
runtime.No .env file selected. Right-click a .en: No .env file selected. Right-click a .env file in the Explorer or open one before running this command.
runtime.Run `npx dotenvx run -- <your command>`: Run `npx dotenvx run -- <your command>` to decrypt at runtime.
